title: React to good and bad news
subtitle: Use natural emotional reactions.
overview: Add one follow-up question or comment.

items.es: ¡Qué buena noticia! Me alegro mucho por ti.
items.en: What good news! I am very happy for you.
I am very sorry. Do you need help?

items.es: Qué pena que no puedas venir.
items.en: What a shame that you cannot come.

items.es: Me alegra que todo haya salido bien.
items.en: I am glad that everything went well.

items.es: Espero que te sientas mejor pronto.
items.en: I hope you feel better soon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.es: Me han ofrecido un nuevo trabajo.
lines.en: They have offered me a new job.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: What good news! I am very happy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Thanks. I am nervous, but happy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Es normal. Seguro que irá bien.
lines.en: It is normal. I am sure it will go well.
